1.title: RDS CPU usage %
1.query:
timeseries usage = avg(dt.cloud.aws.rds.cpu.usage, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.relational_database_service }
| fieldsAdd relational_database_service_name = entityName(dt.entity.relational_database_service)
| sort arrayAvg(usage) desc
| limit 10

2.title: RDS network transmitted throughput
2.query:
timeseries tx = avg(dt.cloud.aws.rds.net.tx, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.relational_database_service }
| fieldsAdd relational_database_service_name = entityName(dt.entity.relational_database_service)
| sort arrayAvg(tx) desc
| limit 10

3.title: RDS network received throughput
3.query:
timeseries rx = avg(dt.cloud.aws.rds.net.rx, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.relational_database_service }
| fieldsAdd relational_database_service_name = entityName(dt.entity.relational_database_service)
| sort arrayAvg(rx) desc
| limit 10
